_header_basic_settings.tooltip: More window/tile management related hotkeys at the bottom section of settings.

defaultEnabledWorkspaces.description: Enable tiling by default on these workspaces
defaultEnabledWorkspaces.tooltip: Comma/space-separated 1-based workspace numbers. Example: "1, 3" enables tiling on workspace 1 and 3 on extension start.

tilingToggleHotkey.description: Toggle hyprmon auto-tiling on the current workspace

tilingRetileHotkey.description: Force re-tile windows on the current workspace (manual reflow)

tilingResetHotkey.description: Reset hyprmon tiling layout on the current workspace

gapsToggleHotkey.description: Toggle hyprmon gaps on/off on the current workspace (tiling-enabled only)

hudNotifyTimeoutMs.tooltip: How long the custom hyprmon notification banner stays visible.

hudNotifyPosition.tooltip: Accepted values: top-center, bottom-center, active-monitor. Invalid values fall back to top-center.

sideviewPrevHotkey.description: Switch to previous sideview on the current workspace

sideviewNextHotkey.description: Switch to next sideview on the current workspace

moveWindowToPrevSideHotkey.description: Move focused window to previous sideview

moveWindowToNextSideHotkey.description: Move focused window to next sideview

opacityToggleHotkey.description: Toggle auto-opacity on/off for the current workspace

floatToggleHotkey.description: Toggle floating for focused window (works on tiling-enabled workspaces too)

defloatAllHotkey.description: De-float all hyprmon floating/sticky windows (drops them back into tiling if enabled)

stickyToggleHotkey.description: Toggle sticky (all workspaces) for focused window (also marks it floating)

forceFloatingRules.tooltip: Comma/newline-separated regex rules. If a rule matches a window's WM_CLASS or title, hyprmon will IGNORE it for tiling (it remains floating). Prefixes: class:<regex> or title:<regex>. Without prefix, matches both. Lines starting with # are comments.

outerGap.description: Outer gap (px) — distance from screen edge
outerGap.tooltip: Applied between the usable work area (panels excluded) and the tiled window region.

extraTopGap.description: Extra top gap (px) — additional reserved space
extraTopGap.tooltip: Extra vertical padding at the top of the tiling work area. Useful if panels/bars are not detected correctly.

extraBottomGap.description: Extra bottom gap (px) — additional reserved space
extraBottomGap.tooltip: Extra vertical padding at the bottom of the tiling work area. Useful if panels/bars are not detected correctly.

innerGap.description: Inner gap (px) — distance between tiled windows

tileBordersEnabled.description: Draw tile border overlays on tiling-enabled workspaces

tileBorderActiveWidth.tooltip: Border width for the focused tile on the active workspace.

tileBorderInactiveWidth.tooltip: Border width for non-focused tiles on the active workspace.

tileBorderActiveColor.tooltip: Border color for the focused tile.

floatStickyBordersEnabled.description: Draw special borders for floating and sticky windows

floatBorderColor.tooltip: Border color for hyprmon-managed floating windows.

stickyBorderColor.tooltip: Border color for hyprmon-managed sticky windows.

tileBorderRadius.tooltip: Rounded corners for the border overlays (visual only).

newWindowPointerModifier.tooltip: If set (e.g. "Alt" or "Super"), holding that modifier WHILE a new window is created will place it like a drop under the mouse cursor (splitting the tile under the pointer). If empty, pointer placement is disabled. Accepted: Super|Mod4|Meta|Win, Alt|Mod1, Ctrl|Control, Shift.

_header_transitions.description: Optional visuals / transitions (best effort on X11)

overlayAnimateDurationMs.tooltip: Applies to overlay moves/resizes. Disabled automatically during live-resize ticks.

geometryAnimateDurationMs.tooltip: Small step-based move/resize. Kept very short; disabled during live-resize and live-move grabs.

swapLeftHotkey.description: Swap with tile to the left

swapRightHotkey.description: Swap with tile to the right

changeShapeLeftHotkey.description: Change shape with left neighbor (toggle split axis for a symmetric pair)

changeShapeRightHotkey.description: Change shape with right neighbor (toggle split axis for a symmetric pair)

changeShapeUpHotkey.description: Change shape with upper neighbor (toggle split axis for a symmetric pair)

changeShapeDownHotkey.description: Change shape with lower neighbor (toggle split axis for a symmetric pair)

resizeStepPx.tooltip: How many pixels to move the split boundary per keypress when using Grow hotkeys.

minTileSizePx.tooltip: Best-effort safety clamp: prevents keyboard resize and live border resize from pushing the layout into tiles smaller than this. If the current layout already violates this minimum (too many windows), the clamp is relaxed to avoid getting stuck.

growLeftHotkey.description: Grow active tile from left edge (takes space from left neighbor)

growRightHotkey.description: Grow active tile from right edge (takes space from right neighbor)

growUpHotkey.description: Grow active tile from top edge (takes space from upper neighbor)

growDownHotkey.description: Grow active tile from bottom edge (takes space from lower neighbor)

shrinkLeftHotkey.description: Shrink active tile from left edge

shrinkRightHotkey.description: Shrink active tile from right edge

shrinkUpHotkey.description: Shrink active tile from top edge

shrinkDownHotkey.description: Shrink active tile from bottom edge
